info.title: Track-POD API
info.description:
Track-POD API enables ERP or any other system integration with Track-POD without need for any manual data input. Our API provides an easy HTTP interface to Track-POD functionality through JSON or XML

Endpoint:
https://api.track-pod.com/

Request headers:
X-API-KEY - API Key. Please find the API key in the Track-POD settings
Content-Type - (POST/PUT) Request input type: application/json - JSON, application/xml - XML
Accept - Response output type: application/json - JSON, application/xml - XML
Accept-Encoding - Response compression: gzip, deflate, br

Webhooks:
Create/Update/Delete route, Create/Update/Delete order, and more How to use Webhooks?

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid X-API-KEY in the request header

415.description: Unsupported Media Type. Invalid Content-Type in the request header. Must be application/json or application/xml

429.description: Too Many Requests. Rate limit is 20 requests/sec and 400 requests/min

parameters.name: updateAddressGps
parameters.description: Force update existing Lat/Lon in the Addresses directory from the payload data.

parameters.name: updateGoodsPrice
parameters.description: Force update existing Price in the Goods directory from the payload data.

application/xml.example:
<NewOrder xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
  <Number>cv30001-2</Number>
  <Id>10000345</Id>
  <Date>2019-02-01T00:00:00</Date>
  <Type>0</Type>
  <Shipper>Sanitex</Shipper>
  <Depot>9 Riverside, Salford M7 1PA</Depot>
  <Client>Maxima</Client>
  <Address>2 St Josephs Crescent, Liverpool L3 3JF</Address>
  <AddressLat>25.290479</AddressLat>
  <AddressLon>65.294049</AddressLon>
  <AddressZone>Zone 1</AddressZone>
  <TimeSlotFrom>2019-02-01T09:00:00</TimeSlotFrom>
  <TimeSlotTo>2019-02-01T18:00:00</TimeSlotTo>
  <ServiceTime>10</ServiceTime>
  <Note>Only to sign Invoice</Note>
  <ContactName>John Doe</ContactName>
  <Phone>+37061191244</Phone>
  <Email>X-604@maxima.com</Email>
  <Weight>50.5</Weight>
  <Volume>8.54</Volume>
  <Pallets>3.5</Pallets>
  <COD>20.45</COD>
  <Barcode>1234567890123</Barcode>
  <GoodsList>
    <NewOrderGoods>
      <OrderLineId>22435324</OrderLineId>
      <GoodsId>30495</GoodsId>
      <GoodsName>Some big mystic box</GoodsName>
      <GoodsUnit>pcs.</GoodsUnit>
      <Note>ID3658AAA</Note>
      <Quantity>10.5</Quantity>
      <Cost>2.99</Cost>
      <OrderLineBarcode>1234567890123</OrderLineBarcode>
      <GoodsBarcode>1234567890123</GoodsBarcode>
    </NewOrderGoods>
  </GoodsList>
  <CustomFields>
    <NewCustomField>
      <Id>cf_456</Id>
      <Value>value</Value>
    </NewCustomField>
  </CustomFields>
</NewOrder>

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Route code

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Order number

parameters.name: allowTransfer
parameters.description: If true allows transferring order (without delivery status) from another route

parameters.name: allowReschedule
parameters.description: If true allows rescheduling, transferring order (with failed delivery status) from another route and clears old status

Id.description: Unique identifier in user accounting system

TimeSlotFrom.description: Desired delivery/pickup time from, yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss or HH:mm:ss

TimeSlotTo.description: Desired delivery/pickup time till, yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss or HH:mm:ss

Status.description: The HTTP status code for the response

Title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the response

Detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this response.

Status.description: The HTTP status code for the response

Title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the response

Detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this response.

ApiResponse.description: Object for all API responses, except GET (status code: 200)

StatusDate.description: Local date and time when the status changed, yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss. If empty, the default will be now UTC+0.

OrderLineId.description: Order line (goods line in the order) unique identifier in user accounting system

GoodsId.description: Goods (directory) unique identifier in user accounting system

GoodsRejectReasonId.description: Goods Reject Reason Id from GoodsIssue list of GET /RejectReason endpoint. Applicable when the actual quantity is less than the quantity.

CompleteOrderGoods.description: Optional. By default, all goods are completed in full.

Value.description: Custom Field Value. Format depends on Custom field type.

DepotId.description: Unique identifier in user accounting system

OrderLineId.description: Order line (goods line in the order) unique identifier in user accounting system

GoodsId.description: Goods (directory) unique identifier in user accounting system

GoodsUnit.description: Unit of measure: pcs, pkg, kg, lbs

QuantityFact.description: Quantity or weight at fact(accepted quantity/actual quantity)

Photos.description: Array of links for download jpg file (each link is available for 24h from API call)

OrderLineBarcode.description: Order line (goods line in the order) barcode

Scanned.description: Goods is scanned in the mobile application

Value.description:
Custom Field Value in format:
CheckBox - true
Number - 123.45
Date - 2019-09-18
Time - 13:00
DateTime - 2019-09-18T13:45:00
Text - Text Value

Service Time, min.
If seconds are specified value will be decimal
